name: Germanium Fuzz
explanation: A vintage two-transistor germanium fuzz: an AC-coupled, very high-gain stage feeds an asymmetric clipper (soft knee into a hard ceiling) that mimics a cascaded transistor pair. The Bias control shifts the operating point and, turned down, starves the circuit for gated, spitty fuzz; Tone tilts dark-to-bright and Volume sets the output. Controls: Fuzz, Bias, Tone, Volume.
